headline: What 13 giant wealth management firms paid CEOs in 2025
summary: The rising tide of asset values led to compensation increases above 200% in some cases, but small ticks down for the chiefs of two firms.

raw.headline: What 13 giant wealth management firms paid CEOs in 2025

headline: Goldman Sachs (GS) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
summary: Goldman (GS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +7.39% and +1.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
